title: AIOps Epistemic Field Update
description: Schema for an Epistemic Field reclassification update per GADS §5 and AMD-001 §C.2.6

update_id.description: UUID v4 for this specific EF update event

update_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC when this update was applied

update_type.description: Type of Epistemic Field update per GADS §5 and AMD-001 §C.2.6

domain.description: Observability domain of the updated item

item_id.description: Identifier of the EF item being reclassified

item_description.description: Human-readable description of what this EF item represents

from_region.description: Epistemic region before this update (none = new item)

update_reason.description: Explanation of why this reclassification occurred

triggering_record_ids.description: Observability Store record IDs that triggered this reclassification

triggering_gps_message_id.description: GPS message_id that triggered this update, if applicable

confirmed_expires_at.description: For to_region: confirmed — when this item must be re-verified

instrument_class.description: GMF instrument class of the evidence supporting Confirmed classification

dispute_observer_positions.description: For to_region: disputed — the observer positions causing disagreement

gps_adapt_message_ref.description: GPS adapt message_id that carries this update in adapt_payload.epistemic_field_updates
